verses.1: For the music director; according to Shushan Eduth. A Mikhtam of David, to teach; when he fought with Aram-naharaim and Aram-zobah, and Joab returned, and killed twelve thousand of Edom in the Valley of Salt. God, You have rejected us. You have broken us; You have been angry; restore us!
verses.2: You have made the land quake, You have split it open; Heal its cracks, for it sways.
verses.3: You have made Your people experience hardship; You have given us wine to drink that makes us stagger.
verses.4: You have given a banner to those who fear You, That it may be displayed because of the truth. Selah
verses.5: That Your beloved may be rescued, Save us with Your right hand, and answer us!
verses.6: God has spoken in His holiness: “I will triumph, I will divide up Shechem, and measure out the Valley of Succoth.
verses.7: “Gilead is Mine, and Manasseh is Mine; Ephraim also is the helmet of My head; Judah is My scepter.
verses.8: “Moab is My washbowl; I will throw My sandal over Edom; Shout loud, Philistia, because of Me!”
verses.9: Who will bring me into the besieged city? Who will lead me to Edom?
verses.10: Have You Yourself not rejected us, God? And will You not go out with our armies, God?
verses.11: Oh give us help against the enemy, For rescue by man is worthless.
verses.12: Through God we will do valiantly, And it is He who will trample down our enemies.
